options.name: Opt-001: Form resolution: none detected — symmetric rectangular tower
options.description: Form resolution: none detected — symmetric rectangular tower. The building will be a 20-storey commercial office, 40m x 40m, with a central core sized to meet compliance and program requirements.
options.compliance_snapshot:
AUTHORITY COMPLIANCE RULES (MANDATORY — embed values used into manifest compliance_parameters):
## Lift Engineering — BS EN 81-20 / CIBSE Guide D:
{
  "_standard": "BS EN 81-20 / CIBSE Guide D",
  "traffic_analysis": {
    "speed_by_height_m": [
      {
        "max_building_height_m": 30,
        "speed_m_s": 1.6
      },
      {
        "max_building_height_m": 60,
        "speed_m_s": 2.5
      },
      {
        "max_building_height_m": 120,
        "speed_m_s": 5.0
      },
      {
        "max_building_height_m": 9999,
        "speed_m_s": 7.0
      }
    ],
    "avg_passengers_per_trip": 10,
    "door_time_s": 4.0,
    "passenger_transfer_time_s": 1.1,
    "peak_demand_fraction": 0.12,
    "interval_period_s": 300,
    "occupants_per_lift": 300,
    "target_waiting_time_s": 25
  },
  "capacity_limits": {
    "min_lifts": 2,
    "max_lifts_per_block": 12,
    "max_total_lifts": 16
  },
  "car_dimensions_mm": {
    "min_width": 1100,
    "min_depth": 1400,
    "std_width": 2000,
    "std_depth": 2000
  },
  "door_min_width_mm": 1000
}
## Fire Safety (SCDF):
{
  "_standard": "SCDF Fire Code 2023",
  "_note": "Keys prefixed '_disabled_' are intentionally suppressed \u00e2\u20ac\u201d their values must come from live RAG retrieval. Remove the prefix to re-enable as a static fallback.",

    "min_car_platform_depth_mm__clause": "6.6.5",

    "min_distance_to_exit_staircase_door_mm": 5000,
    "min_distance_to_exit_staircase_door_mm__clause": "6.6.4",
    "max_distance_to_exit_staircase_door_at_ground_level_mm": 10000,
    "max_distance_to_exit_staircase_door_at_ground_level_mm__clause": "6.6.4",
    "min_area_for_ess_mm2": 20000000,
    "min_area_for_ess_mm2__clause": "10.3.3",
    "min_width_for_ess_mm": 4000,
    "min_width_for_ess_mm__clause": "10.3.3",
    "min_depth_for_ess_mm": 5000,
    "min_depth_for_ess_mm__clause": "10.3.3",
    "_source": "SCDF_fire _code"
  },
  "smoke_stop_lobby": {

  },
  "staircase": {

  "travel_distance": {

    "max_travel_distance_mm__clause": "TABLE 2.2A",
    "max_travel_distance_sprinklered_mm": 75000,
    "max_travel_distance_sprinklered_mm__clause": "TABLE 2.2A",
    "max_dead_end_mm": 15000,
    "max_dead_end_mm__clause": "TABLE 2.2A",
    "max_dead_end_sprinklered_mm": 20000,
    "max_dead_end_sprinklered_mm__clause": "TABLE 2.2A",
    "_source": "SCDF_fire _code"
  }
}
## Structural — Wall Thicknesses:
{
  "_standard": "Approved Document A / General Practice",
  "wall_thickness_mm": {
    "core_structural": 350,
    "standard": 200
  }
}

options.name: Opt-002: Form resolution: S-shaped → using shell with "shape": "el...
options.description: Form resolution: S-shaped → using `shell` with `"shape": "ellipse"` and `footprint_offset_overrides`. The building will be a 30-storey commercial office, with an elliptical floor plate of 45m x 70m, and a central core sized to meet compliance and program requirements, including a target core area ratio of 20%.

manifest.registry_intent: Complex architecture with an S-shape organic form.
